characters.description: The demonic tree who leads Ashfallen chooses to defend Red Vine Peak and the nearby cities from the approaching Beast Tide and unnatural storm. He is a Nascent Soul cultivator whose portals, roots, offspring forests, and summoned servants give him influence across the region.
characters.name: Ashlock

characters.description: Ashlock's adopted daughter and an accomplished Star Core cultivator. She stands among Ashfallen's principal defenders as the sect prepares for the Beast Tide, while Vincent Nightrose's interest in unusual bloodlines places her in immediate danger.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: The powerful ruler of the Blood Lotus and Ashfallen's immediate human enemy. He has prolonged his power by harvesting bloodlines, cultivates blood and gravity affinities alongside an unidentified third affinity, and is believed to be near the upper reaches of Nascent Soul.
characters.name: Vincent Nightrose

characters.description: A Voidmind power and Ashfallen adviser who evaluates Vincent Nightrose as a near-Monarch threat with several affinities. Her experience and measured assessment help shape the emergency council's response to the enemy and the Beast Tide.
characters.name: Morrigan

characters.description: A winged half-demon and one of Stella’s closest allies. Diana supports Stella and stands with Ashfallen’s principal defenders as the sect prepares for the approaching threats.
characters.name: Diana

characters.description: A Starweaver representative who comes to Ashfallen with his sister Celeste. Their family can read fate, and he seeks temporary cooperation against Vincent Nightrose while remaining cautious about Ashlock's rapid growth and unknown limits.
characters.name: Evander Starweaver

characters.description: Evander's sister and a Starweaver representative whose family bloodline has recently awakened. Because Vincent previously took the bloodline of another Starweaver sister, Celeste has reason to seek Ashfallen's temporary protection and alliance.
characters.name: Celeste Starweaver

characters.description: A Redclaw leader and established Ashfallen ally. He enters Red Vine Peak with the other senior allies to hear the truth behind Ashfallen's supposed hidden immortal and reaffirms his family's loyalty before Ashlock explains his identity.
characters.name: Magnus Redclaw

characters.description: A Redclaw smith who forges a huge blood-iron sword for Ashlock at Stella’s request. The weapon is designed to draw upon Ashlock’s exceptional life force.
characters.name: Elder Mo

characters.description: Elaine's partner and an Ashfallen builder who arrives at Red Vine Peak as the allied elders gather beneath Ashlock's canopy. His practical construction work supports the sect as it prepares its cities and defenses for the coming crisis.
characters.name: Douglas

characters.description: A Voidmind-born member of Ashfallen who identifies Douglas as her partner when he joins the gathering at Red Vine Peak. She remains part of the inner coalition trusted with Ashlock's true identity and the sect's defense plans.
characters.name: Elaine

characters.description: Ashlock's divine ash companion and a trusted member of his established forces. Larry is present around the inner circle as Ashlock discloses his true nature to the Redclaw and Silverspire allies before the wider conflict begins.
characters.name: Larry

characters.description: A healing Ent who treats Stella after Ashlock's new blood-iron sword shatters her weapon and injures her during a test. Sol's restorative ability makes the Ent a valuable part of Ashfallen's support network.
characters.name: Sol

characters.description: A former Blood Lotus Grand Elder who now aids Stella. Valandor says World Tree sap supplied by Janus Crestfallen freed him from Vincent's control, and he brings Stella Ether manuals before warning that Vincent has demanded her presence at a summit.
characters.name: Valandor

characters.description: Stella’s apparent father, a Nascent Soul cultivator reported to have faked his death and hidden within the Frozen Star Sect. He warned Stella to flee, while their biological relationship remains uncertain.
characters.name: Janus Crestfallen

characters.description: The keeper of a library who provides the spatial-anchor technique for Stella’s assassination mission. Quill serves as her designated extraction point, so a broken void shield will return her to his library.
characters.name: Quill

characters.description: A shadow lich Ent of Nascent Soul strength who acts as Ashlock's servant and spokesman. Anubis intervenes when Nightrose guardians try to seize Diana and Stella at the summit entrance, relaying Ashlock's authority through the confrontation.
characters.name: Anubis

characters.description: A powerful shadow-titan Ent deployed against the Nightrose guardians blocking Ashfallen's summit delegation. Hades demonstrates overwhelming physical force by crushing both guardians after they reject Stella's claim to Red Vine Peak.
characters.name: Hades

characters.description: Ashlock's peak Star Core Void-affinity Ent. Chaos is sent into Nightrose Castle to search for Vincent Nightrose's true body while Ashlock negotiates through Anubis.
characters.name: Chaos

characters.description: Ashlock’s mystic vice-cult leader tends one of his offspring before taking her relatives into Nightrose City on his orders. She clears the false fog and follows his direction to seek public trust through an apparent rescue by the All-Seeing Eye.
characters.name: All-Seeing Eye vice-cult leader

characters.description: Maple's World Walker sibling, brought into Nightrose City through a mystic ritual. Pluto is a hostile void-oriented intruder who rejects Ashlock's commands, damages the castle, kills trapped civilians, and argues for returning reality to the void.
characters.name: Pluto

characters.description: A World Walker allied to Ashlock and the sibling of Pluto. Maple has commonly appeared as a white squirrel, but Pluto's arrival establishes that the quiet companion belongs to a far stranger and more dangerous kind of being.
characters.name: Maple

characters.description: A sacred shadow-tree cultivator and Tartarus overseer with two linked souls in separate bodies. Nox agrees to risk the soul housed in her dryad body by implanting it into an egoless, soul-devouring wraith whose uncontrolled emergence could be catastrophic.
characters.name: Nox

characters.description: Stella's Dark Tide Devourer pet, introduced while consuming old formation materials during the reconstruction of Nightrose Castle. Its appetite lets the rebuilding force clear and reclaim valuable remnants from the ruined defenses.
characters.name: Guppy

characters.description: The owner of Moonlit Desires and an Eyepatch regional manager. Sullivan profits from blood-pill recruitment and resents Ashfallen’s broad distribution of cultivation opportunities. When he refuses Stella’s disguised demand to meet the group’s leader, she orders Guppy to pursue him without killing him.
characters.name: Sullivan

characters.description: A young outer disciple of Ashfallen and an earth cultivator from a farming family. Sam is trapped in tunnels beneath the blood-puppet horde with a broken arm while Douglas tries to protect the injured group.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: An outer Ashfallen disciple, earth cultivator, and former Iron Fist Brotherhood thug. Hugo is injured beside his friend Sam while Douglas fortifies underground passages against the advancing blood puppets.
characters.name: Hugo

characters.description: An outer Ashfallen disciple who cultivates water. Ray is unconscious after the group's failed clash with the blood puppets and urgently needs soul healing while Douglas and the others struggle to escape through the tunnels.
characters.name: Ray

characters.description: A battle-capable bastion whose vines and void tendrils carry Ashlock’s Abyssal Devourer attack against Vincent Nightrose. Orion works with Erebus to open a breach through Vincent’s illusion storm.
characters.name: Orion

characters.description: A battle-capable bastion that withstands the assault on Ashlock’s defenses. Erebus combines its power with Orion’s to tear open a breach in Vincent Nightrose’s illusion storm.
characters.name: Erebus

characters.description: A slime ally used in the final trap against Vincent. After taking in some of Stella's blood and key, Bob assumes her appearance so that Vincent attacks a convincing false target while the real Stella remains concealed.
characters.name: Bob
